title: SCR Repaints By Skywalker - 170, 357, 377, 458, 700, 717
description:
Retextured Class 377s from the base mod Minecraft Transit Railway that gives you the train classes 170, 357, 377, 458/0, 458/5, 700, 717 in Stepford Connect Livery.

Class 700/717 base texture by Kingfisher
body:
Retextured Class 377s from the base mod Minecraft Transit Railway that gives you the train classes 170, 357, 377, 458/0, 458/5, 700, 717 in Stepford Connect Livery.

Class 700/717 base texture by Kingfisher
Clas 170/357 by Electrostar Judge
The base model (Class 377) was created by Jonathan Ho

SCR textures by Skywalker_6517

**THIS PACK INCLUDES THE CLASS 458 TEXTURES CREATED BY Skywalker_6517!**

Please feel free to retexture into other train liveries, for more information please check the Minecraft Transit Rilway Discord

This resource pack is suitable for versions 3 and 4 of Minecraft Transit Railway
